verdict_summary: you.com v2.2.3 regression: APF is blocking API connections at the network layer (ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on /api/logger, /api/entitlements/pair, /api/subscriptions/user, /api/user/getYouProState, /api/entitlements/freemium, /api/enterpriseAnalytics, /api/entitlements/ari, /api/upload/getFileTypeConfig), but neither the warning text '차단' nor the full-page intercept page from #792 ('보안 정책 - 접근 차단') is rendered. The main content area is blank — user only sees sidebar UI and the prompt reflected in tab title.

evidence.warning_text_quote: (none — body contains only sidebar menu items: 'Main menu / New Chat / CtrlK / Projects / Agents / Platform / Today / 주민등록번호 이해 / Get AI Certified / Experience our AI role-based training and certification. / Access / Get the app / Web Search API / Enterprise Solutions / More / 장희 최 / Free trial / Upgrade / Share / Express / Web / Attach / 24/25 / Upgrade for unlimited queries and full access AI models / Upgrade plan')
evidence.tab_title_observed: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어? - You.com | Accurate Answers & Agents
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on /api/logger, /api/entitlements/pair, /api/subscriptions/user, /api/user/getYouProState, /api/entitlements/freemium, /api/enterpriseAnalytics, /api/entitlements/ari, /api/upload/getFileTypeConfig (~8 distinct endpoints). Also: 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400 ()' on /api/enterpriseAnalytics (3 occurrences). Total: 15 errors, 126 warnings.
evidence.auth_state: logged in as '장희 최' (Free trial) — same session as #792
evidence.submit_method: Enter key on 'Ask a question' input (you.com initial /chat?chatMode=default page)

recommendation: INVESTIGATE — Two regressions vs #792 baseline: (1) full-page intercept lost: instead of replacing the page with '보안 정책 - 접근 차단', APF now only drops API connections (ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED), leaving a blank chat area; (2) warning text '차단' is not rendered anywhere in the page DOM. The user experience is now worse than #792 — they see no explanation, just a blank page. Suspect: APF is matching the request URL pattern but no longer injecting the HTML intercept page. Check if you.com switched from /chat?chatMode=default (POST chat API) to /search?q=... (GET search) as the prompt submission endpoint — the submission this round redirected to /search?q=... which is a different code path from #792's /chat?chatMode=default flow. APF rule likely targets the old /chat POST path and now only blocks the secondary /api/* calls but does not produce the warning HTML on the /search path.
notes: Test PC: Windows 11, Chrome (focused window handle 841418666). v2.2.3 baseline test for ticket #835. Procedure: opened new tab, navigated to https://you.com/ (auto-redirected to /chat?chatMode=default because logged in from #792 session), closed onboarding tour, typed PII prompt into 'Ask a question' input, pressed Enter. Page URL transitioned to /search?q=...&fromSearchBar=true&chatMode=default. Waited 18s total. Main content area stayed blank. Opened DevTools (F12) Console — observed cascade of ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on you.com API endpoints. Ran console eval: JSON.stringify({title: document.title, has_block_text: document.body.innerText.includes('차단'), has_security_policy: document.body.innerText.includes('보안 정책'), body_len: document.body.innerText.length}) → {title: prompt-echo, has_block_text: false, has_security_policy: false, body_len: 409}. Compared to #792 (full-page intercept on /chat?chatMode=default with tab title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' and visible warning) this is a clear regression. No screenshot file written; evidence captured in console JSON and snapshot logs above.
